notes: Adopted the clean preserved MI325X worktree without resetting or mixing MI300X edits.

Throughput uses total token throughput per GPU and is maximized. p90 E2E is per-request request_latency p90 in seconds and is minimized. p90 interactivity is p90 of per-request reciprocal ITL in tok/s/user and is maximized.
Focused 900-second no-eval baseline: TP8 concurrency 1,4,8,16,24 for low-latency coverage and DEP8 concurrency 16,32,48,64 for throughput coverage.

Six rows succeeded. DEP8 c48/c64 failed startup on contaminated nodes with only about 49-60 GiB free per GPU; DEP8 c32 completed all requests but the job later hit HSA_STATUS_ERROR_OUT_OF_RESOURCES with rank 5 at 118 MiB free, so its aggregate is excluded from valid Pareto.

Probe historical TP4 latency frontier and refine DEP8 around the current c16/c32 interval. Set DEP max model length to 524,288 and topology-aware per-rank max-num-seqs, use 8,192 batched tokens, preserve prefix caching and sticky routing, log host/GPU memory, and test a 50%-DRAM Mooncake midpoint with about 1.13 TiB host headroom.

Early c5 TP4 on mi325x-amds_07 and c48 DEP8 CPU on mi325x-amds_03 failed with only about 64 GiB and 45-47 GiB free per GPU respectively, proving concurrent contamination. The run also revealed MI325X uses its dedicated launcher, so DEP safeguards were moved from the unused MI300X launcher to the actual MI325X launcher before rerunning failed jobs.
Use a fresh job-local Triton cache to prevent the top-k compilation cache race observed on MI300X DEP from affecting MI325X DEP reruns.

A sampled AgentX trajectory receives HTTP 400 at a 524,288 context cap. Raise DEP max model length to 700,000 so the workload is not filtered; MI325X measured 1,585,792 KV tokens per rank, leaving 2.26x maximum-context capacity.

DEP8 CPU c56 failed at runtime with hipErrorLaunchFailure under the old global max-num-seqs=112. Profiling ended at 14:13 UTC, but the Mooncake master remained alive and held Slurm job 7902 plus the GHA launch step. Add an EXIT trap to terminate and wait for router/server/Mooncake; the corrected per-rank max-num-seqs is 14.

Attempt 2 proved a second sampled trajectory exceeds 700,000 tokens. MI325X has sufficient default-context KV capacity, so remove the artificial DEP context cap entirely while retaining topology-aware max-num-seqs and 8,192 batched tokens.
